Earth at Night 2012

Local demo texture: earth-at-night-2012.jpg
Source: https://svs.gsfc.nasa.gov/30028/
Downloaded: 2026-07-15
SHA-256: 18ee3bd634967a2cacbe9513ba42ff56fe382b3b43604c4cb7e5935309a3ea5d

Credit requested by the source:

NASA Earth Observatory image by Robert Simmon, using Suomi NPP VIIRS data
provided courtesy of Chris Elvidge (NOAA National Geophysical Data Center).
Suomi NPP is the result of a partnership between NASA, NOAA, and the
Department of Defense.

The checked-in 1024x512 JPEG is the source page's `earthatnight2012_print.jpg`
download. It is loaded locally at runtime so the PathMX demo does not depend
on a third-party image host.
